remember: Students will be able to recall the meaning and concept of secularism.
Students will be able to list the features of secularism.
Students will be able to identify the importance of secularism in a democratic country.
understand: Students will be able to explain the reasons behind the adoption of secularism in India.
Students will be able to describe the role of secularism in maintaining social harmony.
Students will be able to analyze the significance of secularism in the Constitution of India.
apply: Students will be able to apply the principles of secularism in real-life situations.
Students will be able to identify and evaluate the implications of secularism in different contexts.
Students will be able to suggest ways to promote secularism in a diverse society.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the relationship between secularism and other democratic values.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of secularism on social and political institutions.
Students will be able to identify the challenges to secularism in a pluralistic society.

ncert_objectives: Explain the concept of secularism and its importance in a democratic country.
Discuss the features of secularism and its adoption in the Indian Constitution.
Describe the role of secularism in maintaining social harmony and promoting national integration.
board_exam_objectives: Define secularism and its significance in the Indian Constitution.
Explain the reasons behind the adoption of secularism in India.
Discuss the implications of secularism on social and political institutions.
